description: This file defines configuration properties for notifications within a Spring Boot application, including settings for email and SMS channels, as well as integrations with SendGrid and Twilio services.

classes.name: NotificationProperties
classes.description: Holds configuration properties related to the notification system, including enable flag, channel configurations, and external service settings.

classes.name: ChannelProperties
classes.description: Defines properties such as provider and 'from' identity for email or SMS channels.

classes.name: SendGridProperties
classes.description: Configuration properties specific to SendGrid email service, including API key and base URL.

classes.name: TwilioProperties
classes.description: Configuration properties specific to Twilio SMS service, including account SID, auth token, and base URL.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Getter for the 'enabled' flag that determines if notifications are active.

methods.name: getEmail
methods.description: Accessor for the email channel properties.

methods.name: getSms
methods.description: Accessor for the SMS channel properties.

methods.name: getOfficerEmail
methods.description: Get the email address of the officer.

methods.name: setOfficerEmail
methods.description: Set the email address of the officer.

methods.name: getOfficerPhone
methods.description: Get the phone number of the officer.

methods.name: setOfficerPhone
methods.description: Set the phone number of the officer.
